title: Decide peer-reported location privacy semantics
description: Why this exists: network-derived location may come from peer- or mesh-reported coordinates, but treating peer reports as this node location is privacy- and semantics-sensitive. What needs to be done: decide whether peer-reported coordinates can ever become this node NETWORK location, define provenance/source_name rules, decide trust/staleness/epoch policy alignment with build/provision floors, and add protocol vectors/docs before production ingestion.
